deepReviewed.name: PathOfBuildingCommunity/PathOfBuilding-PoE2
deepReviewed.finding: Current maintained PoB2; rich manually/generated Lua bases, mod parsers, uniques, runes and soul-core support; audit/control only.

deepReviewed.name: PathOfBuildingCommunity/PathOfBuilding-PoE2-v2
deepReviewed.finding: Archived historical repository; not current authority.
deepReviewed.codeLicense: repository license not asserted by audit

deepReviewed.name: HivemindOverlord/poe2-mcp
deepReviewed.finding: Local structured Mods.datc64 extraction with 16,788 stated records and provenance metadata; no normalized complete unique/socketable item model established.

deepReviewed.name: poe2-tools/poe2-build-planner
deepReviewed.finding: Items are free-text plans; RePoE is used for gem data, not a structured item-mod database.

deepReviewed.name: repoe-fork/repoe
deepReviewed.finding: Pinned parser used to create 5M.1 export; parser paths normalize Mods, ModsByBase and BaseItemTypes separately.

deepReviewed.name: repoe-fork/poe2
deepReviewed.finding: Pinned technical export used by 5M.1 and this audit.
deepReviewed.codeLicense: generated-data repository; no general data grant asserted
deepReviewed.gameDataRights: GGG-derived; existing narrow conditional approval only

uncertainties: GitHub topic membership is time-dependent; this file pins the audit date and commits.
Repository metadata licenses apply to code only unless a separate data grant is explicit.
